item.title: Helping Out a Prime Truck
item.description: A Prime truck in trouble gets expert help. What recovery steps turn this tough situation around?

media:content.media:title: Helping Out a Prime Truck
media:content.media:description: A Prime truck in trouble gets expert help. What recovery steps turn this tough situation around?

item.title: Ron Pratt Rescues a Batwing from the Muck
item.description: Ron Pratt tackles a batwing stuck deep in the muck — a messy but satisfying recovery. What’s the dirtiest recovery you’ve ever done?

media:content.media:title: Ron Pratt Rescues a Batwing from the Muck
media:content.media:description: Ron Pratt tackles a batwing stuck deep in the muck — a messy but satisfying recovery. What’s the dirtiest recovery you’ve ever done?

item.title: Moving a Heavy Load
item.description: When the job demands strength and precision, Ron Pratt steps in. How does he handle this massive recovery?

media:content.media:title: Moving a Heavy Load
media:content.media:description: When the job demands strength and precision, Ron Pratt steps in. How does he handle this massive recovery?

item.title: Recovering a Loaded, Overturned Box Van
item.description: Heavy, loaded, and overturned — this box van recovery is no small task. What’s the hardest loaded recovery you’ve seen?

media:content.media:title: Recovering a Loaded, Overturned Box Van
media:content.media:description: Heavy, loaded, and overturned — this box van recovery is no small task. What’s the hardest loaded recovery you’ve seen?

item.title: When the Job Goes Sideways, Literally!
item.description: Recovery doesn’t always go as planned — sometimes the job tilts in unexpected ways. What’s your most memorable “sideways” moment?

media:content.media:title: When the Job Goes Sideways, Literally!
media:content.media:description: Recovery doesn’t always go as planned — sometimes the job tilts in unexpected ways. What’s your most memorable “sideways” moment?

item.title: Cleaning Up a Burnt Car on the Interstate
item.description: A fire leaves nothing but wreckage. This clip shows the cleanup of a burnt car on the highway. What’s the toughest fire‑damaged recovery you’ve witnessed?

media:content.media:title: Cleaning Up a Burnt Car on the Interstate
media:content.media:description: A fire leaves nothing but wreckage. This clip shows the cleanup of a burnt car on the highway. What’s the toughest fire‑damaged recovery you’ve witnessed?

item.title: When a Flatbed Load Goes WRONG!
item.description: Loads shift, straps fail — this flatbed recovery shows what happens when things go sideways. What’s the worst load failure you’ve seen?

media:content.media:title: When a Flatbed Load Goes WRONG!
media:content.media:description: Loads shift, straps fail — this flatbed recovery shows what happens when things go sideways. What’s the worst load failure you’ve seen?

item.title: Why Training Matters in HazMat Incidents
item.description: HazMat calls demand preparation. This clip shows why training makes all the difference. What’s the most critical safety step in HazMat recovery?

media:content.media:title: Why Training Matters in HazMat Incidents
media:content.media:description: HazMat calls demand preparation. This clip shows why training makes all the difference. What’s the most critical safety step in HazMat recovery?

item.title: Pulling a Pickup from the Ditch
item.description: A pickup stuck in the ditch needs a careful pull to get free. What’s your go‑to method for ditch recoveries?

media:content.media:title: Pulling a Pickup from the Ditch
media:content.media:description: A pickup stuck in the ditch needs a careful pull to get free. What’s your go‑to method for ditch recoveries?

item.title: Dipping Our Toes in the Water
item.description: Recovery gets wet — this clip shows the challenges of working in and around water. What’s the toughest water recovery you’ve faced?

media:content.media:title: Dipping Our Toes in the Water
media:content.media:description: Recovery gets wet — this clip shows the challenges of working in and around water. What’s the toughest water recovery you’ve faced?
